title: RELEASE SAVEPOINT after ALTER TABLE crashes mserver5
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test (a INTEGER, b VARCHAR(50), c DATE DEFAULT NULL);
ALTER TABLE test ADD COLUMN d FLOAT;
UPDATE test SET c = CURRENT_DATE WHERE a = 1;
SELECT a, b, COALESCE(c, 'No Date') AS date_info FROM test;
key_bug_features: RELEASE SAVEPOINT after ALTER TABLE operation
